---
title: "NeuralGraph.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/NeuralGraph.tsx"
loc: 432
complexity: 54
logic_score: 1.00
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 4.22
overall_score: 2.07
---

## Intent
React component rendering NeuralGraph with 54 logic branches.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [useRef](file://react)
- [useState](file://react)
- [useEffect](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [useThree](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [extend](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [Html](file://@react-three/drei)
- [shaderMaterial](file://@react-three/drei)
- [Line](file://@react-three/drei)
- [Text](file://@react-three/drei)
- [*](file://d3-force-3d)
- [*](file://gsap)

### Exports
- `FresnelMaterial`
- `tempObject`
- `tempColor`
- `SelectionHighlight`
- `materialRef`
- `FresnelAura`
- `materialRef`
- `logicVal`
- `isToxic`
- `NeuralLink`
- `lineRef`
- `STELLAR_MAP`
- `getStar`
- `p`
- `TextLabel`
- `textRef`
- `filename`
- `NeuralGraph`
- `NeuralGraph`
- `useThree`
- `sphereMeshRef`
- `tetraMeshRef`
- `simReady`
- `hovered`
- `selectedNode`
- `trajectories`
- `useMemo`
- `fallback`
- `files`
- `nodes`
- `nodeMap`
- `linkList`
- `usedIds`
- `pathStr`
- `orphans`
- `getVisScale`
- `getStarColor`
- `p`
- `fetchTrajectories`
- `res`
- `data`
- `orphans`
- `radius`
- `oCount`
- `theta`
- `map`
- `layers`
- `activeNodeId`
- `currentMesh`
- `isNeighbor`
- `sId`
- `tId`
- `scale`
- `isHovered`
- `isSelected`
- `nodeMatrix`
- `handleNodeClick`
- `targetPos`
- `validLinks`
- `activeNodeId`
- `sNode`
- `tNode`
- `isHighlighted`
